notes: v0.16.46 — BOSS RUSH: leaderboard TOP 10 (was 7) + class-filter tabs (ALL / SHARD / BASTION / LANCE / CHORUS) above the rows. Per-row class chip next to time. Hover any row → tooltip popup floats next to the row showing the runner's SHIP (animated skin atlas) + class name + role + equipped-module loadout snapshot (CORE / WEAPON / MOBILITY / UTILITY) with rarity-coloured diamonds. FIRST CLEAR banner now renders icons INLINE — XP / PULSE / KEY icons immediately before each value. record_boss_time snapshots equipped_modules at clear time so the tooltip can show what the player was running. Old pre-v0.16.46 clears show 'No loadout recorded.' Windows only.
